purpose: Reference registry for external game engines, remakes, public game catalogs, and asset sources that may inform Prismtek-owned implementations.

defaultPolicy.shipPolicy: Do not ship external code, binaries, art, audio, or data from this registry until license and content ownership are reviewed for the exact files being used.
defaultPolicy.preferredUse: Use as local research references, then build original Prismtek code and assets.

references.name: Awesome Game Remakes
references.notes: Catalog says most games require original assets; each linked project must be reviewed separately.

references.name: Open Source Game Clones
references.notes: Use as discovery only; every listed project needs separate license and content review.

references.name: Screaming Brain Studios
references.licenseObserved: CC0 / Public Domain stated by source site
references.notes: Good candidate for original Prismtek assets after pack-level provenance is recorded.

references.name: OpenGameArt
references.notes: Record exact asset page, author, license, attribution text, and derivative chain before committing files.

references.name: T-Rex Runner Game Nintendo DS
references.licenseObserved: no license file found during review
references.notes: Useful for devkitPro Nintendo DS structure; do not ship its code or assets without explicit permission.

references.name: TerrariaDS
references.notes: Useful for tile world and survival mechanics; do not ship in commercial Prismtek distributions.

references.name: Minicraft DS Edition
references.licenseObserved: no license file found during review
references.notes: Useful for dual-screen survival UI patterns; do not ship its code or assets without explicit permission.

references.name: Castagne Engine
references.licenseObserved: MPL 2.0 for engine source per project materials; assets and docs vary by folder
references.notes: Evaluate for Pixel Fruit Arena combat architecture before adoption.

references.name: OpenBOR
references.notes: Good for original Prismtek side-scrolling brawler modules; community modules require separate review.

references.name: Ikemen GO
references.licenseObserved: MIT engine; bundled screenpack assets and FFmpeg have separate terms
references.notes: Good for traditional 2D fighter experiments; MUGEN-format content must not be assumed safe.

references.name: TORCS
references.licenseObserved: GPL v2 source with some non-free artwork directories noted by project README
references.notes: Useful for racing AI and simulation architecture; avoid vendoring bundled data/artwork.
